text: How to get support | Claude Help Center How to get support This guide explains how to get support for your Claude or Console account. Different support options are available depending on your plan. Pro and Max plans, Team and Enterprise plan Owners, and Console Admins You have full access to: All help documentation All help documentation Fin, our AI support bot Fin, our AI support bot Further assistance from our Product Support team Further assistance from our Product Support team Note: While we don't offer phone or live chat support, our Product Support team will gladly assist you through our support messenger. Seeking support for Claude Log in to your Claude account. Log in to your Claude account. Click your initials or name in the lower left corner and select “Get help” from the menu. Click your initials or name in the lower left corner and select “Get help” from the menu. In the support messenger: Search help resources Chat with Fin, our AI support bot In the support messenger: Search help resources Search help resources Chat with Fin, our AI support bot Chat with Fin, our AI support bot Click “Send us a message” to start chatting with Fin. Click “Send us a message” to start chatting with Fin. Click "Accept," then select your issue from the available options. Click "Accept," then select your issue from the available options. Depending on the selected issue, provide additional details when prompted. Depending on the selected issue, provide additional details when prompted. If your issue requires additional investigation or input from our Product Support team, Fin will pass your inquiry along and someone will respond via email. If your issue requires additional investigation or input from our Product Support team, Fin will pass your inquiry along and someone will respond via email. Seeking support for the Claude API or Console Log in to your Console account ( platform.claude.com ). Log in to your Console account ( platform.claude.com ). Click your initials or name in the lower left corner of the Console and select “Get help” from the menu. Click your initials or name in the lower left corner of the Console and select “Get help” from the menu. This will open a support messenger in the lower right corner of the Console. This will open a support messenger in the lower right corner of the Console. In the support messenger: Search
